examples.sentence: My grandparents have always been the salt of the earth, helping neighbors without expecting anything in return.
examples.translation: My grandparents have always been the salt of the earth, helping neighbors without expecting anything in return.

examples.sentence: You can trust Carlos; he's truly the salt of the earth and would never let you down.
examples.translation: You can trust Carlos; he's truly the salt of the earth and would never let you down.

examples.sentence: In times of crisis, it’s the salt of the earth folks who step up and support the community the most.
examples.translation: In times of crisis, it’s the salt of the earth folks who step up and support the community the most.

examples.sentence: After years of honest work, the farmers were regarded as the salt of the earth by everyone in town.
examples.translation: After years of honest work, the farmers were regarded as the salt of the earth by everyone in town.

examples.sentence: She is considered salt of the earth because of her honesty and reliability in all matters.
examples.translation: She is considered salt of the earth because of her honesty and reliability in all matters.

examples.sentence: The volunteers, salt of the earth people, were recognized for their selfless dedication.
examples.translation: The volunteers, salt of the earth people, were recognized for their selfless dedication.

examples.sentence: They have always been salt of the earth, dependable and straightforward in their dealings.
examples.translation: They have always been salt of the earth, dependable and straightforward in their dealings.

examples.sentence: Ever since his deployment, Jake has developed a salty tooth, constantly craving chips and pretzels.
examples.translation: Ever since his deployment, Jake has developed a salty tooth, constantly craving chips and pretzels.

examples.sentence: Do you have a salty tooth? Because you always reach for the salted nuts during movie nights.
examples.translation: Do you have a salty tooth? Because you always reach for the salted nuts during movie nights.

examples.sentence: She had a salty tooth last night and ended up eating an entire bag of popcorn by herself.
examples.translation: She had a salty tooth last night and ended up eating an entire bag of popcorn by herself.

examples.sentence: Mark’s salty tooth led him to prefer olives and salted crackers over sweets during the party.
examples.translation: Mark’s salty tooth led him to prefer olives and salted crackers over sweets during the party.

examples.sentence: If you have a salty tooth, you might enjoy the new snack bar that just opened downtown.
examples.translation: If you have a salty tooth, you might enjoy the new snack bar that just opened downtown.

examples.sentence: She always carries some salted almonds because her salty tooth strikes when she’s on the road.
examples.translation: She always carries some salted almonds because her salty tooth strikes when she’s on the road.

examples.sentence: I found that my salty tooth worsens whenever I’m stressed or tired after work.
examples.translation: I found that my salty tooth worsens whenever I’m stressed or tired after work.

examples.sentence: Whether you take the highway or the back roads, it's the same difference in travel time to get there.
examples.translation: Whether you take the highway or the back roads, it's the same difference in travel time to get there.

examples.sentence: I can’t decide between the blue or green shirt, but honestly, it's the same difference as both look great.
examples.translation: I can’t decide between the blue or green shirt, but honestly, it's the same difference as both look great.

examples.sentence: He said he prefers coffee, but when it’s iced or hot, it’s the same difference to him.
examples.translation: He said he prefers coffee, but when it’s iced or hot, it’s the same difference to him.

examples.sentence: Taking the train or the bus to work is the same difference in terms of cost and duration.
examples.translation: Taking the train or the bus to work is the same difference in terms of cost and duration.

examples.sentence: Whether we meet at 3 PM or 4 PM, it's the same difference because the event starts late anyway.
examples.translation: Whether we meet at 3 PM or 4 PM, it's the same difference because the event starts late anyway.

examples.sentence: Cooking the chicken in the oven or on the grill is the same difference for the recipe’s flavor.
examples.translation: Cooking the chicken in the oven or on the grill is the same difference for the recipe’s flavor.

examples.sentence: Driving or walking to the nearby store is the same difference when the weather is nice.
examples.translation: Driving or walking to the nearby store is the same difference when the weather is nice.

examples.sentence: When Jack told me he was late again because of traffic, I just sighed and thought, 'same old story.'
examples.translation: When Jack told me he was late again because of traffic, I just sighed and thought, 'same old story.'

examples.sentence: Every time the team loses, it feels like the same old story repeating itself without any improvement.
examples.translation: Every time the team loses, it feels like the same old story repeating itself without any improvement.

examples.sentence: I was hoping for a change, but the meeting was the same old story with the boss complaining about deadlines.
examples.translation: I was hoping for a change, but the meeting was the same old story with the boss complaining about deadlines.

examples.sentence: Whenever she calls to complain about her job, it’s just the same old story of stress and long hours.
examples.translation: Whenever she calls to complain about her job, it’s just the same old story of stress and long hours.

examples.sentence: It’s the same old story every winter—roads get icy and accidents increase.
examples.translation: It’s the same old story every winter—roads get icy and accidents increase.

examples.sentence: The report was disappointing but honestly, it was the same old story about missed targets and budget cuts.
examples.translation: The report was disappointing but honestly, it was the same old story about missed targets and budget cuts.

examples.sentence: He shrugged when asked about the delay, saying it was the same old story with the unreliable supplier.
examples.translation: He shrugged when asked about the delay, saying it was the same old story with the unreliable supplier.

examples.sentence: Children everywhere dream of Santa’s workshop, imagining elves busily making toys all year round.
examples.translation: Children everywhere dream of Santa’s workshop, imagining elves busily making toys all year round.

examples.sentence: Every Christmas Eve, the story of Santa’s workshop at the North Pole fills the hearts of little ones with magic.
examples.translation: Every Christmas Eve, the story of Santa’s workshop at the North Pole fills the hearts of little ones with magic.

examples.sentence: Parents told their kids that Santa’s workshop was already buzzing with preparations for the holiday season.
examples.translation: Parents told their kids that Santa’s workshop was already buzzing with preparations for the holiday season.

examples.sentence: The legend says that Santa’s workshop is located at the North Pole where elves craft toys for children worldwide.
examples.translation: The legend says that Santa’s workshop is located at the North Pole where elves craft toys for children worldwide.

examples.sentence: In many holiday movies, Santa’s workshop is shown as a magical place filled with colorful toys and busy helpers.
examples.translation: In many holiday movies, Santa’s workshop is shown as a magical place filled with colorful toys and busy helpers.

examples.sentence: Every December, stories about Santa’s workshop inspire children to believe in the spirit of giving and joy.
examples.translation: Every December, stories about Santa’s workshop inspire children to believe in the spirit of giving and joy.

examples.sentence: Some schools decorate their classrooms to look like Santa’s workshop to get students excited for the holidays.
examples.translation: Some schools decorate their classrooms to look like Santa’s workshop to get students excited for the holidays.

examples.sentence: I was about to admit my mistake when the fire alarm went off—I was saved by the bell.
examples.translation: I was about to admit my mistake when the fire alarm went off—I was saved by the bell.

examples.sentence: If the meeting had lasted five minutes longer, I’d have been cornered, but luckily I was saved by the bell when the phone rang.
examples.translation: If the meeting had lasted five minutes longer, I’d have been cornered, but luckily I was saved by the bell when the phone rang.

examples.sentence: She was saved by the bell when her presentation was interrupted just as she stumbled over her words.
examples.translation: She was saved by the bell when her presentation was interrupted just as she stumbled over her words.

examples.sentence: The boxer was saved by the bell when the round ended just before the referee could count him out.
examples.translation: The boxer was saved by the bell when the round ended just before the referee could count him out.

examples.sentence: During the intense game, the whistle blew, saving the player by the bell from a potential foul call.
examples.translation: During the intense game, the whistle blew, saving the player by the bell from a potential foul call.

examples.sentence: He was saved by the bell as the timer went off before his time to answer was up, preventing a penalty.
examples.translation: He was saved by the bell as the timer went off before his time to answer was up, preventing a penalty.

examples.sentence: In the final seconds, the bell rang, saving the team by the bell from losing the match.
examples.translation: In the final seconds, the bell rang, saving the team by the bell from losing the match.

examples.sentence: I was about to get called out in class, but the bell rang just in time—I was saved by the bell.
examples.translation: I was about to get called out in class, but the bell rang just in time—I was saved by the bell.

examples.sentence: When the argument got heated, a sudden phone call saved me by the bell from having to respond.
examples.translation: When the argument got heated, a sudden phone call saved me by the bell from having to respond.

examples.sentence: She was saved by the bell when the meeting ended abruptly before her embarrassing mistake was noticed.
examples.translation: She was saved by the bell when the meeting ended abruptly before her embarrassing mistake was noticed.

examples.sentence: Thanks to the unexpected cancellation, he was saved by the bell and avoided having to give his speech.
examples.translation: Thanks to the unexpected cancellation, he was saved by the bell and avoided having to give his speech.

examples.sentence: She was saved by the bell when a last-minute email delayed the deadline, sparing her from penalties.
examples.translation: She was saved by the bell when a last-minute email delayed the deadline, sparing her from penalties.

examples.sentence: If the judge hadn’t arrived early, the defendant wouldn’t have been saved by the bell and might have faced immediate arrest.
examples.translation: If the judge hadn’t arrived early, the defendant wouldn’t have been saved by the bell and might have faced immediate arrest.

examples.sentence: He was saved by the bell when the school bell rang just as the teacher called on him for the wrong answer.
examples.translation: He was saved by the bell when the school bell rang just as the teacher called on him for the wrong answer.

examples.sentence: The prisoner was literally saved by the bell when the guard’s shift ended moments before his escape attempt.
examples.translation: The prisoner was literally saved by the bell when the guard’s shift ended moments before his escape attempt.

examples.sentence: In the boxing match, the fighter was saved by the bell as the round ended before the knockout count finished.
examples.translation: In the boxing match, the fighter was saved by the bell as the round ended before the knockout count finished.

examples.sentence: The student was saved by the bell when the fire alarm rang, ending class before the teacher could reprimand him.
examples.translation: The student was saved by the bell when the fire alarm rang, ending class before the teacher could reprimand him.

examples.sentence: After the embarrassing mistake, he told a joke to save face and lighten the mood.
examples.translation: After the embarrassing mistake, he told a joke to save face and lighten the mood.

examples.sentence: She tried to save face by explaining the delay was due to circumstances beyond her control.
examples.translation: She tried to save face by explaining the delay was due to circumstances beyond her control.

examples.sentence: Even though the project failed, they made adjustments to save face in front of the investors.
examples.translation: Even though the project failed, they made adjustments to save face in front of the investors.

examples.sentence: He saved face by quietly withdrawing his controversial statement before it caused more trouble.
examples.translation: He saved face by quietly withdrawing his controversial statement before it caused more trouble.

examples.sentence: They saved face by attributing the error to a misunderstanding rather than negligence.
examples.translation: They saved face by attributing the error to a misunderstanding rather than negligence.

examples.sentence: After the public criticism, the company took steps to save face by improving its customer service policies.
examples.translation: After the public criticism, the company took steps to save face by improving its customer service policies.

examples.sentence: To save face, the politician avoided answering the tough questions during the interview.
examples.translation: To save face, the politician avoided answering the tough questions during the interview.

examples.sentence: When I started explaining, my brother cut me off and said, 'Save it, I don’t want to hear your excuses.'
examples.translation: When I started explaining, my brother cut me off and said, 'Save it, I don’t want to hear your excuses.'

examples.sentence: She told him to save it after he kept complaining about things no one could change.
examples.translation: She told him to save it after he kept complaining about things no one could change.

examples.sentence: If you’re going to argue, save it—I’m not interested in debating this right now.
examples.translation: If you’re going to argue, save it—I’m not interested in debating this right now.

examples.sentence: Can you save it for later? I’m too busy to eat now but don’t want it to go to waste.
examples.translation: Can you save it for later? I’m too busy to eat now but don’t want it to go to waste.

examples.sentence: We saved the leftovers to save it for the guests coming next week.
examples.translation: We saved the leftovers to save it for the guests coming next week.

examples.sentence: I always save it when I get discounts so I can use them on bigger purchases later.
examples.translation: I always save it when I get discounts so I can use them on bigger purchases later.

examples.sentence: Please save it for me; I’ll need it when I start my new project next month.
examples.translation: Please save it for me; I’ll need it when I start my new project next month.

examples.sentence: You might as well save your breath; she’s not going to change her mind about the trip.
examples.translation: You might as well save your breath; she’s not going to change her mind about the trip.

examples.sentence: I tried explaining the rules, but he told me to save my breath because he wasn’t listening.
examples.translation: I tried explaining the rules, but he told me to save my breath because he wasn’t listening.

examples.sentence: Don’t waste your time arguing with him—save your breath and focus on what you can control.
examples.translation: Don’t waste your time arguing with him—save your breath and focus on what you can control.

examples.sentence: During the strenuous climb, hikers were advised to save their breath to avoid exhaustion.
examples.translation: During the strenuous climb, hikers were advised to save their breath to avoid exhaustion.

examples.sentence: She learned to save her breath while swimming long distances to conserve energy.
examples.translation: She learned to save her breath while swimming long distances to conserve energy.

examples.sentence: The instructor told us to save our breath during the meditation exercise to improve focus.
examples.translation: The instructor told us to save our breath during the meditation exercise to improve focus.

examples.sentence: In the cold air, it’s important to save your breath and breathe slowly to prevent dizziness.
examples.translation: In the cold air, it’s important to save your breath and breathe slowly to prevent dizziness.
